cards.title: Problem Formulation
cards.governance_note: Separate the real-world concern from the computational task.

cards.title: Representation
cards.governance_note: Document data structures, schemas, graphs, features, and state assumptions.

cards.title: Correctness
cards.governance_note: Record tests, proofs, invariants, and known failure modes.

cards.title: Complexity
cards.governance_note: Estimate time, memory, latency, maintenance, and monitoring costs.

cards.title: Algorithmic Governance
cards.governance_note: Document review, appeal, monitoring, incident response, and retirement conditions.
